title: alectryon semicinereus
intro: Alectryon semicinereus, also known as the 'Kamani tree', is a plant species belonging to the Sapindaceae family. The leaves and roots of Alectryon semicinereus have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Alectryon semicinereus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions.
